description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
While providing space to pass, a Zoox vehicle in conventional mode was slowly moving forward in response to an oncoming truck. While 
passing, the truck came into contact with the Zoox vehicle's rear radar sensor. There were no injuries and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
